records.ety: [L., fr. inter between + im, an old accusative of is he, this, that.]

defs: The meantime; time intervening; interval between events, etc.
quotes: All the interim is Like a phantasms, or a hideous dream.

defs: A name given to each of three compromises made by the emperor Charles V. of Germany for the sake of harmonizing the connecting opinions of Protestants and Catholics.
